summary: Comprehensive testing of StayBnB Airbnb clone application completed. Backend APIs 100% functional, frontend 95% functional with minor UI interaction issues.

ui_bugs.issue: Modal overlay prevents some button clicks, requiring force clicks

integration_issues.issue: Auth session occasionally expires during navigation requiring re-login

design_issues.issue: Share button not easily accessible or clickable

passed_tests: User registration flow (guest and host roles)
User login flow with admin credentials
Homepage property cards and category filters
Host dashboard with stats and properties
